iotsitewise.accesspolicy.iamrole.CfnAbou: Contains information about an AWS Identity and Access Management role. For more information, see [IAM roles](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/IAM/latest/UserGuide/id_roles.html) in the *IAM User Guide*.

iotsitewise.accesspolicy.iamrole.arn.Description: The ARN of the IAM role. For more information, see [IAM ARNs](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/IAM/latest/UserGuide/reference_identifiers.html) in the *IAM User Guide*.
